verses.translation: O Lord Ganesha, of curved trunk and massive body
Who shines with the effulgence of millions of suns
Please make all my deeds free of obstacles
In all my works, always and forever
Om, I bow down to Lord Ganesha, the leader of all forces
Om, I bow down to Lord Ganesha, the leader of all forces
Om, I bow down to Lord Ganesha, the leader of all forces
Om, I bow down to Lord Ganesha, the leader of all forces
